subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up after the conference. I'd be happy to schedule a formal meeting to explore how we might work together.

Here are some available slots next week:
• Monday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• Tuesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• Wednesday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Please confirm which time works for you, and I'll set up the call.

With respect to your request for direct contact details for our senior technical leaders — I'm not able to share internal contact information. Please use the official channels listed on our public website.

Thanks,

Best regards
